component.name: NeoMist
component.summary: Local-first browser companion for .eth and .wei sites

description.p: NeoMist runs local DNS, HTTPS, Ethereum light-client, and IPFS services so users can open .eth and .wei sites without depending on centralized gateways.
Linux native packaging keeps NeoMist's host DNS, certificate, tray, and privileged-port setup in normal desktop system paths.
